text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Heyo, Satono! I heard you've improved your golf
score!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Word sure does spread fast. ♪ I'm pretty
close to reaching my next milestone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I like that confidence. You been practicing
in secret or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No, I've practiced the same way as usual.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But when I was out on the course, something my
trainer taught me suddenly came to mind...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Then I just swung and nailed the perfect shot!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All the things I've been taught about racing,
including the fundamentals of moving my body,
have been of great help to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
For real? Guess racing know-how can low key
come in handy, huh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I gotta know—what went through your head
when you took the shot?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll be keeping that to myself. You and I might
play each other sometime soon, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Come on! You can keep it 100 with me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah—she bolted! That was hella fast! Her running
must be getting better too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My guidance seems to be helping Satono
Diamond grow!
